items.title: Crew owners get 18th NWSL team for record fee
items.summary: The NWSL awarded an expansion franchise to Columbus, Ohio, and an ownership consortium led by the Haslam Sports Group. The new Columbus-based team will begin play in 2028.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: NWSL awards 18th expansion team to Columbus in bid led by Crew owners, will begin play in 2028
items.summary: The incoming NWSL team will be based at ScottsMiracle-Gro Field, home of MLS' Columbus Crew
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Bulls head coach Donovan resigns after six seasons
items.summary: Billy Donovan resigns as head coach of the Chicago Bulls, ending his six-season tenure, after missing out on the play-offs.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.
